name: RPlog_Guest_of_the_Empire_part_5
title: Guest of the Empire, Part V
summary: Aboard the Star Destroyer Broadsword, ISB Agent Korynn Fleming wakes the captured Chyleni pilot Kyrin Sh'vani from a medicated sleep, having healed her wounds and removed the torture devices in a calculated bid to re-educate her into an Imperial spy. Speaking with feigned gentleness, he reveals that the threats against her homeworld of Chylene and her wings were staged lies, claiming it was all to reach the 'real' her and offer her a new life. Kyrin, still trembling and broken, summons her dignity to challenge him to an honorable duel to the death, two blasters each in the hangar bay, but Fleming refuses, insisting she is a guest who does not make demands and will learn her place. As he departs, Kyrin curses him in her native tongue and lunges with her talons, but the well-fed agent easily overpowers and throws the starved prisoner across the cell. Fleming seals her in, and Kyrin crawls beneath her cot in utter despair, her last ember of rebellion nearly extinguished.
